Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews

Class DragNDropInstantiator.TacletFilter.TacletWithNoIf

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews.DragNDropInstantiator.TacletFilter.TacletWithNoIf
All Implemented Interfaces:
DragNDropInstantiator.TacletFilter
Enclosing interface:
DragNDropInstantiator.TacletFilter
public static class DragNDropInstantiator.TacletFilter.TacletWithNoIf extends Object implements DragNDropInstantiator.TacletFilter
This filter selects all Taclet which have no assume, but a find.
